name: native-select
description: A styled native <select> that keeps platform form/keyboard behavior with a custom chevron and focus ring

meta.name: NativeSelect
meta.description: A styled native <select> that keeps platform form/keyboard behavior with a custom chevron and focus ring

props.name: options
props.description: Options to render. Alternatively pass <option> children.

props.name: children
props.description: Raw <option> children (used when options is not provided).

props.name: invalid
props.description: Marks the control as invalid for error styling and a11y.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder rendered as a disabled, hidden first option.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called when the selected value changes.

props.name: disabled
props.description: When true, disables the control and removes it from the tab order.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class names merged onto the root element.

examples.title: Basic
examples.code:
<NativeSelect
  placeholder="Choose a country"
  options={[
    { value: 'us', label: 'United States' },
    { value: 'de', label: 'Germany' },
  ]}
  onChange={(e) => setCountry(e.target.value)}
/>

whenToUse: A standard single-choice dropdown where native behavior and form integration matter most
Mobile-first forms that should use the platform picker UI
Pairing with a Field/Label inside a regular HTML form
whenNotToUse: Multi-select, search/typeahead, or rich option rendering — use the custom Select/Combobox
A handful of mutually exclusive options where radios read better

antiPatterns.why: Native <option> cannot render icons or be searched; use a custom listbox for rich options

related.name: Select
related.reason: Custom-rendered listbox for richer options at the cost of native form/keyboard behavior

related.name: RadioCard
related.reason: Better for a small fixed set of mutually exclusive choices shown inline

intent.a11yRationale: It is a real <select>, so the browser provides the combobox role, keyboard interaction, and announcement. aria-invalid is set when invalid; the placeholder is a disabled hidden first option so it shows but is not selectable.

flexibility.note: Pass an options array or raw <option> children
